title: podman auto-update: connection refused
body:
### Issue Description

╰─ podman auto-update
ERRO[0000] dial unix /run/user/1000/systemd/private: connect: connection refused 

### Steps to reproduce the issue

`podman auto-update`

### Describe the results you received

`ERRO[0000] dial unix /run/user/1000/systemd/private: connect: connection refused`

### Describe the results you expected

An OK-ish result.

```


### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

Rootless

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

_No response_

### Additional information

I will share any additional info if needed.

comments.body: It appears that `XDG_CONFIG_HOME` and `XDG_DATA_HOME` were unset on the machine. I've set them to the user's folder and was able to run `podman auto-update` with it returning nothing, and additionally I was able to run the auto update systemd user service after reboot.
can you close this issue if you are satisfied?
Yes, sorry, auto-update now works normally.
